screen2.title: Our Vision
screen2.text: EarthScore is driving the shift from a linear economy to measurable, profitable circularity. Our Circular Intelligence platform combines data, AI and impact to create a new form of economic efficiency: it reduces costs, increases ROI and reduces CO₂ where it really matters – in operations, in the market and in the value chain. This transforms sustainability from an obligation into a competitive advantage and a driver of growth, resilience and future viability.

block1.title: Circular approach
block1.subtitle: EarthScore circular center
block1.text: At the heart of EarthScore is our AI-powered Circular Centre, where experts work with artificial intelligence to turn data into concrete, sustainable business opportunities. Instead of just reporting, we identify the levers with the greatest benefit along the entire cycle – from procurement and production to use and recycling. This results in practical solutions that reduce costs, save energy, reduce CO₂ emissions and help companies grow responsibly and profitably.

block2.title: For your Business
block2.text: EarthScore supports companies in efficiently fulfilling their ESG and CSRD obligations with a tool that collects and evaluates relevant data in a structured manner. Our circular AI identifies potential savings in costs, energy and CO₂ and opens up additional circular opportunities via the Circular Marketplace. This turns mandatory data into a lever for improved economic efficiency and environmental performance.

block3.title: For your customer dialogue
block3.text: EarthScore turns sustainability claims into verifiable facts. Savings in costs, energy and CO₂ can be presented as clear key figures for B2B partners and end customers and used specifically in product communication, campaigns and reporting. This creates a customer dialogue that replaces greenwashing with transparent impact – and strengthens trust, brand and sales.

screen4.title: EarthScore Solutions for Businesses:
screen4.subtitle: Circular Intelligence That Pays Off
screen4.text: our platform turns ESG and CSRD obligations into mesurable savings in costs, energy and CO₂ – flexible for your value creation and future regulations.

item1.title: Circular AI Engine
item1.text: The Circular AI Engine will be EarthScore's central operating system. It combines ESG and CSRD data with information from ERP, production, supply chain and energy consumption to form a consistent, comprehensible picture of your value creation. AI-supported analyses recognise patterns, identify hotspots in terms of costs, energy and CO₂, and evaluate their potential for efficiency and circularity. At the same time, the engine supports the data management process – for example, through intelligent assistants, guided workflows and automatically condensed management overviews. This provides the basis for robust business cases and modules such as Audits, Efficiency Playbooks and the Circular Marketplace. Where standard functions are not sufficient, we work with you to develop project-based extensions – so that the platform fits your business model perfectly.

item2.title: ESG & CSRD Audit Suite
item2.text: The ESG & CSRD Audit Suite is our proven existing solution for sustainability reporting and regulatory requirements. Sophisticated role and rights management ensures that employees and suppliers see and edit only what is relevant to them – from climate data to supply chain issues. An intelligent ESIN filter reduces over 1,600 data points to the questions that really matter to your company, creating a clearly guided, streamlined ESG and CSRD reporting process. Double materiality analysis, semantic standard parsing and dynamic question trees ensure that you are CSRD-compliant, efficient and future-proof at the same time. This turns complex sustainability regulations into a structured, auditable foundation for your decarbonisation and sustainability strategy, which we adapt to your industry, EU regulations and internal structures on a project basis as required.

item3.title: Efficiency Playbooks
item3.text: The Efficiency Playbooks translate data and analyses into concrete projects for energy efficiency, resource efficiency and decarbonisation. The results of the Circular AI Engine are used to create prioritised packages of measures – from retrofitting existing plants and optimising production processes to material-efficient product designs. Each playbook shows what steps are necessary, what savings in costs, energy consumption and carbon footprint are possible, and how long it typically takes for measures to pay off. This transforms sustainability from an abstract goal into a clear implementation plan for production, operations and management. On request, we can work with you to develop company-specific playbooks and pilot projects that can be seamlessly integrated into your budget planning, investment decisions and your overall transformation and climate protection strategy.

item4.title: Circular Marketplace
item4.text: The Circular Marketplace unlocks additional value creation along the circular economy. Based on your data and material flows, the platform matches waste and by-products with suitable applications at other companies – preferably regionally and across industries. This reduces disposal and procurement costs while creating new sources of revenue and measurably reducing your carbon footprint. The Marketplace boosts resource efficiency, prevents value loss and makes circular business models usable in everyday life – way beyond traditional recycling approaches. Transparent key figures on costs, savings and emissions show which circular relationships are particularly worthwhile. In this way, the Circular Marketplace extends the impact of the Circular AI Engine beyond its own factory and becomes a vibrant ecosystem for sustainable, climate-friendly industrial partnerships.

item5.title: White Label Suite
item5.text: The White Label & Agency Suite is aimed at consultancies, agencies and tax advisory firms that want to offer their clients ESG, sustainability and circular economy solutions without having to build their own technology platform. You gain access to Circular AI Engine, Audit Suite, Efficiency Playbooks and Circular Marketplace and integrate these building blocks into your own brand identities, products and transformation programmes – from energy efficiency and decarbonisation projects to holistic sustainability strategies. This creates recurring revenue models and clearly differentiated offerings in the competitive environment. We provide project-based support for technical integration, data connection and individual customisation to ensure that the setup fits your portfolio perfectly. If you would like to use this model, please contact us directly.

screen6.title: EarthScore Impact Widget:
screen6.subtitle: Next Level Customer Communication
screen6.text: show cost, energy and CO₂ savings as clear key figures – for B2B partners and consumers. Data is transformed into credible stories that build trust, raise brand profile and promote sustainable consumption.

item1.title: Circular Impact Widget – B2B
item1.text: The Circular Impact Widget – B2B shows your business customers in real time how sustainability pays off: during sales meetings, on your website, or at trade show booths. Using data from the Circular AI Engine, it generates interactive scenarios with before/after effects, savings in cost, energy, and CO₂, as well as clearly identifiable ROI indicators. This turns abstract ESG and decarbonization goals into a solid business case for investments in efficiency and circularity. We can tailor the widget’s design, content, and integration to your brand, sales approach, and target customers – feel free to get in touch with us.

item2.title: Trade show booth with proof instead of claims – B2B
item2.text: At your trade show booth or in your showroom, the Circular Impact Widget becomes proof rather than just a claim. Your teams can walk visitors through how much energy, CO₂, and operating costs a retrofit or new product can save over its lifetime—depending on use case, location, or tariff. This turns sustainability promises into verifiable numbers and a powerful sales argument in technical discussions. Visuals, scenarios, and language can be tailored to your brand world and industry narrative, ensuring the experience fits seamlessly with your exhibition and sales concept. If you're interested, we’d be happy to show you concrete examples.

item3.title: Circular Impact in the Shopping Cart – B2C
item3.text: “Circular Impact in the Shopping Cart” means that your customers can already see during the purchasing process how a product affects energy consumption, CO₂ footprint, and operating costs—whether in an online shop, an app, or on a digital shelf. The Circular Impact Widget translates complex sustainability data from the Circular AI Engine into clear, understandable metrics and comparisons. This makes purchasing decisions more transparent, more informed, and economically traceable. We can tailor the presentation, tone, and level of detail to your target groups, touchpoints, and brand positioning, ensuring the widget integrates seamlessly into your existing B2C experience. For custom concepts, feel free to get in touch with us directly.

item4.title: Green claims you can verify – B2C
item4.text: Customers are tired of greenwashing—they want green claims they can verify. The Circular Impact Widget provides transparent data from the Circular AI Engine: metrics on energy savings, CO₂ reduction, and lifecycle effects that can be clearly documented. Companies integrate these facts into campaigns, product pages, customer service, or via QR codes on packaging—strengthening trust and sharpening their brand profile. The scope and depth of information can be flexibly tailored to your industry, regulatory requirements, and communication style. Together, we develop setups that support legal compliance and seamlessly complement your communication strategy—just reach out to us.

item1.name: Manuel Mattern
item1.text: With more than 20 years of experience in the digital economy and technology, Manuel Mattern is regarded as a seasoned industry expert. As the Product Owner of a leading trust seal in German e-commerce, he was responsible for redeveloping the rating and quality system — including its rollout to tens of thousands of existing customers. In recent years, he has also managed and delivered numerous large digital consulting and software projects, from the MVP phase through to full-scale production. At EarthScore, he brings together this product and data expertise to build a scalable Circular Intelligence platform that operationally aligns sustainability, profitability, and decarbonization — and links them strategically for the long term.

item2.name: Martin Börner
item2.text: Martin Börner brings decades of leadership experience from the German telecommunications and IT industry to EarthScore. He first served as General Manager for the smartphone brand Motorola, and subsequently led Samsung’s business in Germany for more than ten years. He also served on the executive board of Bitkom, Germany’s leading digital industry association. At EarthScore, he is responsible for Sales and Business Development, expanding collaboration with enterprise customers, OEMs, and partners. His extensive experience in building complex sales and partner ecosystems directly supports the market launch and scaling of the Circular Intelligence platform.

item3.name: Wilke Stroman
item3.text: Wilke Stroman is a digital entrepreneur and investor with a strong focus on growth and scaling. In 2000, he founded Sparhandy and developed the brand into one of Germany’s best-known and highest-revenue online direct retailers for mobile contracts and smartphone bundles. He then took over responsibility for the German business of the mobilezone group as CEO Germany and was later appointed Co-CEO of the group. Under his leadership, mobilezone Germany was successfully sold to freenet AG. Today, Wilke is increasingly focused on investments and portfolio development. As an investor at EarthScore, he supports the team as a strategic sparring partner for growth, expansion, and value creation.

item4.name: Prof. Agnieszka Gehringer
item4.position:
Head of Board 
 of Scientific Research
item4.text: Prof. Dr. Agnieszka Gehringer is a Professor of Economics at TH Köln and a Senior Research Analyst at the Flossbach von Storch Research Institute, specializing in macroeconomics, financial market integration, innovation economics, and sustainability measurement. She studied economics in Rome and Turin and has taught, among other places, at the University of Göttingen. As co-author of the Springer volume “Mapping Sustainability Measurement,” she provides a current overview of approaches and indicators for measuring sustainability and prosperity beyond GDP. At EarthScore, she heads the Scientific Advisory Board and ensures that the metrics, models, and MRV methods for measuring CO₂, energy efficiency, and circularity effects are built on a robust, empirically grounded framework—serving as a bridge between academic research and a practical Circular Intelligence platform.

item5.name: Igor Shtelmakh
item5.text: Igor Shtelmakh is a computer scientist from Vinnytsia (Ukraine) with two doctorates in computer science, specializing in AI models. In addition to his role as CTO of EarthScore, he conducts research and teaches at the University of Vinnytsia, focusing on modern AI approaches and their practical applications. He has many years of experience building data-driven systems and previously served as Chief Data Officer at Widr Pay in Paris. Igor has successfully developed autonomous AI agents and intelligent automation solutions that are used by major online platforms. At EarthScore, he is responsible for the overall technical architecture of the Circular AI Engine, the development of the platform modules, and stable data and MRV pipelines — with the goal of delivering scalable, reliable, and future-proof Circular Intelligence solutions.

item6.name: David Jäger
item6.text: David Jäger has spent around 15 years working at the intersection of product development, UX design, and digital brand experience. After completing his university studies, he contributed to numerous digital projects, designing user interfaces, design systems, and product logic — and guiding them all the way through implementation. As part of the core team, he has been involved with EarthScore from the very beginning and is responsible for the concept and design of all product interfaces — from ESG and CSRD data-capture logic to dashboards, Circular-AI views, widgets, pitch decks, and visual stories. He translates ESG and Circular Intelligence requirements into clear, intuitive user experiences and ensures that frontend and software development teams implement these concepts with precision. In doing so, he forms a key link between subject-matter expertise, technology, and design.

screen9.title: Book a Demo!
screen9.subtitle: Get in touch with our experts!

cookie.text_descriptions: We use cookies to improve user experience. Choose what cookies you allow us to use. You can read more about our Cookie Policy in our

data_protection.title: Data protection
data_protection.info_top: This website (here in after referred to as „Website“) is provided by WhatsGreen Research & Science GmbH (hereinafter referred to as „uns“ or „wir“).
data_protection.info_bottom: In the following, we would like to inform you in an understandable and concise form about the collection and processing of your data and your related rights.
data_protection.section_1_text: We process personal data that we receive from our customers or other data subjects in the course of our business relationship.
data_protection.section_2: For what purpose is your data processed and on what legal basis?
data_protection.section_2_text: We process personal data in accordance with the provisions of the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG).
data_protection.section_2_1_text: for the performance of contractual obligations (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR)
data_protection.section_2_2_text: Data is processed to fulfill contracts or to carry out pre-contractual measures at your request.
data_protection.section_2_3_text: based on a legitimate interest (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR)
data_protection.section_2_4_text: Where necessary, your data will be processed beyond the above purposes to protect legitimate interests.
data_protection.section_2_5_text: Improvement and further development of the service
data_protection.section_2_6_text: Communication with customers, prospects and users within social networks and platforms
data_protection.section_2_7_text: Advertising or market and opinion research, unless you have objected to the use of your data.
data_protection.section_2_8_text: Assertion of legal claims and defense in legal disputes
data_protection.section_2_9_text: Ensuring the IT security and IT operation of the website
data_protection.section_2_10_text: Measures for building and plant security (e.g. access controls)
data_protection.section_2_11_text: based on your consent (Art. 6 para. 1 a GDPR)
data_protection.section_2_12_text: If you have given us your consent to process your personal data for specific purposes (e.g., sending newsletters), the lawfulness of this processing is based on your consent. You can withdraw your consent at any time. To do so, please contact us at the address given in section 7.
data_protection.section_2_13_text: This also applies to the revocation of declarations of consent that were given to us before the GDPR came into effect, i.e., before May 25, 2018. The revocation of consent only takes effect for the future and does not affect the lawfulness of the data processed up to the point of revocation.
data_protection.section_3_text: We sometimes use specialized service providers to process your data. They only receive the personal data they need for their specific tasks. These service providers are carefully selected and regularly monitored. They process personal data only on our behalf and strictly according to our instructions, based on appropriate data processing agreements.
data_protection.section_4: Will your data be processed outside the EU?
data_protection.section_4_text: Your data will also be processed in part in countries outside the European Union (“EU”) or the European Economic Area (“EEA”), where data protection standards may generally be lower than in Europe. In these cases, we ensure, for example, through contractual agreements with our partners, that a sufficient level of data protection is guaranteed for your data, or we ask for your explicit consent.
data_protection.section_4_1_text: Please note that when using our online presence within social networks and platforms, data may be processed outside the European Union. This may pose risks for users, such as difficulties in enforcing their data subject rights.
data_protection.section_4_2_text: For a detailed description of the respective data processing activities and the options to object (opt-out), please refer to the respective provider of the social networks and platforms. Requests for information and other data subject rights can be most effectively asserted directly with the respective provider. Only they have access to user data and can provide information and take appropriate action.
data_protection.section_5: How long will your data be stored?
data_protection.section_5_text: We process and store your personal data for as long as this is necessary to fulfill our contractual and legal obligations.
data_protection.section_5_1_text: If the data is no longer required for the fulfillment of contractual or legal obligations, it is regularly deleted, unless its – temporary – further processing is necessary for the following purposes:
data_protection.section_5_2_text: – Compliance with commercial and tax law retention obligations, which may arise, for example, from the German Commercial Code (HGB) and the German Fiscal Code (AO). The retention and documentation periods stipulated therein are generally two to ten years.
data_protection.section_5_3_text: – Preservation of evidence within the framework of the statutory limitation periods. According to Sections 195 et seq. of the German Civil Code (BGB), these limitation periods can be up to 30 years, with the standard limitation period being 3 years.
data_protection.section_6_text: You can request information about the data we have stored about you by contacting us at the address given in section 7. Furthermore, under certain conditions, you can request the correction or deletion of your data. You also have the right to restrict the processing of your data and the right to receive the data you have provided in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format.
data_protection.section_6_1_text: If data processing is based on your consent, you can revoke this consent at any time with effect for the future. Please send your revocation to the address given in section 7.
data_protection.section_6_2_text: If data processing is based on overriding legitimate interests, you can object to this data processing if your particular situation justifies it. Please send your objection to the address given in section 7.
data_protection.section_6_3_text: They also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority
data_protection.section_6_4_text: State Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information
data_protection.section_7: Who is responsible for data processing and how can you contact the data protection officer
data_protection.section_7_text: You can reach the data protection officer by mail at the address below
data_protection.section_8: What data processing takes place on the website
data_protection.section_8_text: The following data processing takes place when you visit the website
data_protection.section_8_1_text: Information about each visitor to the website is collected regarding the time, duration and extent of the pages used, as well as information about the accessing computer/mobile device, such as...
data_protection.date_and_time: Date and time of the request
data_protection.time_zone: Time zone difference to Greenwich Mean Time (GMT)
data_protection.operating_system: Operating system and its access status / HTTP status code
data_protection.website_from_which_request: Website from which the request originates
data_protection.browser_language_and_version: Browser, language and version of the browser software were collected.
data_protection.section_8_2_text: The data is collected in pseudonymized form and used to generate anonymous information about how the website is used and to better tailor the content to users. This processing is based on Section 15 of the German Telemedia Act (TMG) and includes the transfer of pseudonymized data to non-EU countries (USA).
data_protection.section_8_3_text: Different services are used for each individual method, and there is an individual right to object
data_protection.section_8_4_text: This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google Inc., 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA (“Google”). Google analyzes the use of this website on our behalf. We use cookies for this purpose. The information collected by Google about your use of this website (e.g., referring URL, pages visited on our site, web browser used, language settings, operating system used, or screen resolution) is transmitted to a Google server in the USA, stored there, analyzed, and the results are provided to us in anonymized form. Your usage data is not linked to your full IP address. We have activated the IP anonymization function offered by Google on this website, so that the last octet (IPv4) or the last 80 bits (IPv6) of your IP address are deleted. Google is also certified under the EU-US Privacy Shield, ensuring an adequate level of data protection for data processed by Google in the USA. You can withdraw your consent to web analytics at any time by either downloading and installing the available browser plugin from Google or by clicking here.
data_protection.section_8_5_text: Both methods prevent web analytics only as long as you are using a browser on which you have installed the plugin, or as long as you do not delete the opt-out cookie. Further information about Google Analytics can be found in the Google Analytics Terms of Service, the Google Analytics Security and Privacy Principles, and the Google Privacy Policy.
data_protection.section_8_6_text: Each time the “Google Maps” component is accessed, Google sets a cookie to process user settings and data when displaying the page on which the “Google Maps” component is integrated. This cookie is generally not deleted when the browser is closed, but expires after a certain period of time, unless you delete it manually beforehand. If you do not agree to this processing of your data, you can deactivate the “Google Maps” service and thus prevent the transfer of data to Google. To do this, you must deactivate JavaScript in your browser. However, please note that in this case you will not be able to use “Google Maps” at all or only to a limited extent. The use of “Google Maps” and the information obtained via “Google Maps” is subject to the Google Terms of Service (google.de/intl/de/policies/terms/regional.html) and the additional terms and conditions for “Google Maps” (google.com/intl/de_de/help/terms_maps.html).
data_protection.section_8_7_text: When you contact us via the contact form, your information will be processed in accordance with Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b) GDPR for the purpose of processing and handling your inquiry. Your information may be stored in a customer relationship management system (“CRM system”) or similar system.
data_protection.inquiries: Inquiries will be stored in the system.
data_protection.section_8_8_text: The requests will be deleted when they are no longer needed. We review the necessity of retaining them every two years; statutory archiving obligations also apply.
data_protection.section_9: Adjustment of the data protection declaration
data_protection.section_9_text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy from time to time. Updates to this privacy policy will be published on our website. Changes are effective upon publication on our website. We therefore recommend that you visit this page regularly to stay informed of any updates.
